race_meta.race_name: Win £250,000 With BetMGM's Golden Goals Novice Stakes

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model correctly identified crown relic (aus) (ranked 1st with 68.0% predicted probability). Strong analytical framework.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Crown Relic (AUS) > Powder Monkey, but actual result was Crown Relic (AUS) > Powder Monkey (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Crown Relic (AUS) showed negative divergence (-5.3%): Model overvalued at 68.0% vs Market 73.3%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
